name: Pepperoni Mushroom Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, egg, and Cheddar cheese. Press into greased microproof 12-inch pizza pan or 10-inch pie pan.
2. Cook uncovered on MEDIUM (50% power) for 2 minutes.
3. Combine tomato sauce, basil, garlic powder, and oregano. Spread over rice crust.
4. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Layer 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, and mushrooms.
5. Top with remaining 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese and parsley.
6. Cook uncovered on MEDIUM for 7 minutes.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes.
